rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct transcription of 'Prethowin.'. Visually verified. gpt-5-mini notes good but transcription 'Prethwin.' is less accurate.
Selected gemini-flash for correct transcription of 'Wiston Bucage'. Visually verified. gpt-5-mini's 'Morton - brocage' is incorrect.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate transcription, especially 'Sparks' and 'Moreton'. Its note on 'Kadane' initial letter is very good, visually confirmed 'K'. gpt-5-mini had multiple transcription errors ('Ladane, Sparky, Mortion').
Selected gemini-flash for correct transcription 'Bodenham Ffre.'. Visually verified. gpt-5-mini's 'Modenham ?flor.' is incorrect.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually verified as a header line that initiates a braced group. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this line with the next and assigned the amount to the combined entry.
Added this row based on visual verification. gemini-flash correctly identified this as a distinct entry with an amount, unlike gpt-5-mini which merged it with the prior line (its row 5).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Boyce for Backgate; Blay, amounting to £4 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visually verified transcription as more accurate ('part ye Ruig pro Brodenham'). gpt-5-mini's 'part & princ pro Muckenham' (its row 6) is incorrect. No amounts are present on this line.
rows.english_description: Part payment towards the rent due for Brodenham (Bodenham).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment towards the rent for Bodenham; no amount recorded.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct transcription ('Increments & Battley'). gpt-5-mini (its row 7) had 'Incremements & Battity'.

rows.description: Rec: more of Mr. Thorne for ye Sto. Bay 1729 â€“
rows.notes: Amounts (10 0 0) agreed by consensus. Description selected from gemini-flash, which is visually verified as highly accurate ('ye Sto. Bay 1729 â€“'). gpt-5-mini (its row 8) had several transcription errors ('Recemore', 'Ho-bay', '1723').
rows.english_description: Additional receipt from Mr Thorne relating to the Sto. Bay for 1729.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Additional receipt from Mr Thorne relating to 1729, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: Rec: more of Mr Haviland for 1729 in full â€“
rows.notes: Pounds and shillings (11 11) from consensus. Description from gemini-flash, visually verified as accurate ('Mr Haviland for 1729'). Pence is '4' followed by an 'ob' ligature for halfpenny (0.5), visually verified. gpt-5-mini (its row 9) noted the 'small loop' but didn't interpret it as 0.5; gemini-flash missed it entirely in its fraction field.
rows.english_description: Additional receipt from Mr Haviland for 1729, recorded as a full payment.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Additional receipt from Mr Haviland for 1729, in full, amounting to £11 11s 4.5d.

rows.description: Rec: more in part for 1723 â€“
rows.notes: Pounds and shillings (30 8) from consensus. Description from gemini-flash, visually verified. Pence is '5' followed by '3q' (three farthings), visually verified as 0.75. gemini-flash incorrectly interpreted this as 0.5; gpt-5-mini (its row 10) missed it.
rows.english_description: Partial receipt towards sums due for 1723.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Partial receipt towards sums due for 1723, amounting to £30 8s 5.75d.

rows.description: moneys left to be paid from Battey due to ye acct.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visually verified transcription as accurate, particularly 'Battey' and 'ye acct.'. gpt-5-mini (its row 11) had multiple errors ('Dalby', '&c.').
rows.english_description: Amounts remaining outstanding from the Battley account due to the college.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Amounts remaining outstanding from the Battley account; no sum recorded.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription 'Gentl. Com.' (its row 12) as more visually accurate. The 'l' is visible and the final 't' is clearer than 's' as in gemini-flash's 'Gens Com:'.

Pounds, shillings, and pence (460 7 8) agreed by consensus. Description and fraction ('q' = 0.25) selected from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribed and interpreted the fraction with contextual reasoning. gpt-5-mini (its row 22) missed the fraction and used 'Sum:' instead of 'Summa'.
